basic_details.job_title: CPCL Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited (CPCL) (CPCL) Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website cpcl.co.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the CPCL Industrial Training Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 25 years as on 01 June 2026 and who have passed CS Intermediate can apply online from 02 May 2026 to 11 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and submit their online applications through the direct links provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age as on 01.06.2026 is 25 Years
age_limit.details: Maximum age as on 01.06.2026 is 25 Years.

qualification.details: Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified: Candidates must have passed the CS – Intermediate.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CPCL Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CPCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CPCL Industrial Training?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CPCL Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified posts is 11-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for this training program?
faq.answer: Candidates must have successfully passed the CS – Intermediate examination to be eligible for this industrial training opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this training is 25 years as of 01.06.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for this training?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 22,000/- per month during the training period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Industrial Training for CS Inter Qualified positions at CPCL.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves initial screening, followed by selection for interviews, and finally, an interview round.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by CPCL for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the training?
faq.answer: The duration of the industrial training is not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for details.
